subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and commanded all to observe that which the Book hath uttered. O Afnán, thy Lord maketh mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و امر الکل بما نطق به الکتاب یا افنانی یذکرک مولی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @chastisement and requital, @idolatry
